{{Quote|Here. ''[…]'' Early Transland Day present. Enjoy.|Daric LaRone gifts a Troukree knife to Korlo Brightwater|<ref name="Choices" />}}
'''Transland Day''' was a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] during which presents were gifted<ref name="Choices" /> and souvenirs were bought.<ref name="OBF">[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]</ref> In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="OBFD">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dubrak Qennto]] stated that the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] was purchasing [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] as if they were Transland Day souvenirs.<ref name="OBF" /> In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="ChoicesD">The events of ''[[Choices of One]]'' take place in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]].</ref> the [[Hand of Judgment]], a group of five former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] acquired a [[Troukree knife]] from the [[Troukree]] [[Vaantaar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Poln Major]]. The Hand of Judgment's leader, [[Daric LaRone]], then gave [[Korlo Brightwater]] the [[Knife/Legends|knife]] as an early Transland Day gift.<ref name="Choices" />

==Behind the scenes==
Transland Day was first mentioned in the [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']], which was written by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="OBF" />

*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
